explanations.8: APP_HOME is set to /ap, which is a shortened path that will be used as the application's home directory inside the container.
explanations.16: The sleep infinity command keeps the container running indefinitely instead of exiting, which is useful for development environments where you want to connect and work inside the container.
explanations.24: Setting default to null means this service will use Docker's default network behavior rather than a custom network configuration.
explanations.36: The user ID 1001:1001 specifies which user account runs processes inside the container (the format is userid:groupid).
explanations.42: create_host_path: true tells Docker to automatically create the /tmp/docker-prod-devcontainer directory on your computer if it doesn't already exist.
explanations.46: volume: {} is an empty configuration that uses default settings for this named volume, which stores VS Code extensions persistently between container restarts.
